name: Gainsight CS
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Gainsight CS
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Gainsight CS with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Gainsight CS for customer support lookups, health summaries, handoffs, and internal customer success workflows.
intro: Gainsight CS helps teams manage the post-sales customer journey, customer health, engagement, and expansion opportunities. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Gainsight-powered action you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill for a support agent or internal AI assistant. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions, retrieve live customer success context, prepare handoffs, and take approved actions inside your rules.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up account health, lifecycle stage, or recent engagement details in Gainsight CS while replying to a customer in chat or over a helpdesk ticket.
Use Gainsight CS data to summarize open risks, renewal context, and recent milestones so the agent can give customers clearer status updates without exposing internal-only details.
Have the agent collect missing information from the customer, then create or update an approved Gainsight CS note, task, or handoff record for the customer success team.
Trigger a bounded escalation workflow when a customer reports churn risk, onboarding blockers, or adoption issues, then return a clear next-step summary to the customer.
Prepare support-to-CS handoffs by combining the customer conversation with Gainsight CS account context, recent activity, and recommended follow-up actions.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a secure chat workspace to retrieve Gainsight CS account summaries, health indicators, success plans, and recent engagement history.
Help customer success managers ask the agent for renewal risk reviews, adoption snapshots, or executive-ready account summaries generated from Gainsight CS data and internal guidance.
Enable operations or leadership teams to use a private AI agent to identify customers needing outreach, summarize segments by status, and trigger approved follow-up workflows.
Support internal SOPs by letting employees ask the agent to create notes, log outcomes, update selected records, or prepare escalations in Gainsight CS within defined approval limits.
Give cross-functional teams a private assistant that combines Gainsight CS context with internal documentation so employees can research accounts and complete handoff workflows faster.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that retrieves customer health and lifecycle context before answering account-related questions.
A handoff Skill that creates structured summaries for customer success managers after support conversations.
An internal assistant that drafts renewal risk summaries from Gainsight CS account activity and health signals.
A workflow Skill that logs approved notes or follow-up tasks after customer interactions.
A private team agent that surfaces onboarding status and next best actions for customer-facing teams.
An escalation Skill that gathers missing context, checks account status, and routes urgent issues safely.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell DocsBot Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with Gainsight CS in plain language, such as looking up account health, preparing a handoff, or triggering a follow-up workflow.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a secure Skill design, identifies the required configuration values, and defines how the agent should retrieve data or take approved actions in Gainsight CS.

howItWorks.title: Connections stay protected
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder handles secure authentication planning by keeping secrets out of chats and Skill content, proxying credentials through approved runtime configuration, and limiting access to the minimum records, users, and actions needed.

howItWorks.title: Safety rules are added
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds scoped permissions, response guidance, and approval boundaries for sensitive updates or escalations so the agent acts within the limits you define.

howItWorks.title: The Skill tests itself
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, weak instructions, or missing checks, and feeds those findings into an improvement loop before deployment.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent for Gainsight CS without writing integration code?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the outcome you want in plain language and the builder designs the Skill, plans the secure connection, tests the workflow, and helps deploy it to the right agent. It can support live lookups, summaries, handoffs, and bounded actions inside your Gainsight CS workflows.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Gainsight CS data during customer chats or support tickets?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a Gainsight CS Skill to retrieve approved account context such as health status, milestones, engagement history, or escalation details while responding to customers. You control what data the agent can access and which actions require tighter limits or approvals.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with Gainsight CS?
faq.answer: Teams can build Skills for account lookups, support-to-CS handoffs, churn-risk escalation prep, follow-up task creation, and conversation summaries tied to customer success context. This helps the agent move from answering questions to taking the next approved step.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help customer success teams work inside Gainsight CS?
faq.answer: Yes, employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve account summaries, review risks, generate success updates, and complete approved internal workflows connected to Gainsight CS. This is useful in private chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams for faster day-to-day execution.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Gainsight CS actions safe and controlled?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines secure configuration values, keeps secrets out of conversations and generated content, proxies authentication through protected runtime settings, and scopes the Skill to the smallest practical set of actions and records. It can also add approval boundaries for sensitive updates, escalations, or workflow triggers.

faq.question: Can DocsBot test a Gainsight CS Skill before teams use it?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot includes an automated testing agent that can simulate support and internal scenarios, identify bugs or workflow gaps, and improve the Skill before it is published. That helps teams launch with clearer instructions, stronger safeguards, and more reliable outcomes.

brand.title: Gainsight
brand.description: Gainsight is a durable growth platform for customer success, product, community, and customer education teams. They help businesses drive efficient growth by unifying the post-sales customer journey through their innovative suite of solutions, leveraging AI-driven insights to enhance engagement, improve retention, and drive expansion.
brand.slogan: Empowering businesses to succeed through human-centered customer growth technology.
